notes: Solid, feature-complete Pong with sweep collision, AI prediction, trail, sound, title screen, and match-over state; minor issue is scores capped at 9 visually (single digit only) and the score display overlaps the net area slightly, but overall a very well-built implementation.
Excellent implementation with continuous collision detection and a smart AI, but the visual score display is hardcapped at 9 despite the win condition being 11.

A solid Pong variant with working controls and presentation, but it has notable completeness issues such as hidden scores above 9 despite playing to 11, no visible ball during serve, and some state/UI oddities that keep it from feeling fully polished.
